message: ⚠️ ALERT: Negative sentiment exceeding 50% for {product_name}. Immediate quality check recommended!
action: Review product quality, check recent batches, contact supplier

message: 📈 OPPORTUNITY: {category} demand surging by {growth_rate}%! Stock up immediately!
action: Increase inventory, negotiate bulk pricing with suppliers

message: 📉 WARNING: {category} - {product_type} showing declining interest. Consider reducing stock.
action: Reduce inventory orders, offer discounts to clear stock
